response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video for visual content (merchandise, fan messages, informational text). 2. Monitored the audio throughout the entire duration. 3. Determined that the audio is strictly instrumental background music with no vocals at any point. 4. Concluded that no lyric searches were necessary as no vocal songs are present.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional slide presentation for the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert featuring Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis. It displays merchandise, fan messages, and concert event information. The audio throughout the video is instrumental, ambient background music commonly used in streaming waiting rooms. No vocal songs were detected.

scenes.description: The video begins by displaying a list of concert merchandise, including a 2-way blanket, shoulder pouch, and acrylic panels.
The video transitions to a series of slides showing fan messages addressed to Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis.
The video displays an on-screen notice stating that the concert will be starting soon.
The video displays an 'Attention for Visitors' slide regarding safety and etiquette during the concert.
The video displays a second list of merchandise, including light sticks, T-shirts, towels, and more.
The video repeats a loop of fan message slides until the end.
